creator: simon@smarlow.com
text:
A port template for the latest version of GHC, 5.02, is in the shar
file below.  The existing port lang/ghc is for version 4.08.2, and
several users have requested that we keep the old version around for a
while.  Hence I've named the new port lang/ghc5, and I'd like to
request that the current lang/ghc be repo-copied and renamed to lang/ghc4.
